## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Feb 27, 2026 - Apr 23, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _marlous meijboom_, Apr 23, 2026, 1/5: "cancellation only possible by email, by mistake the email wasn't send last year as a result I paid again for this year."
            2. _Breen_, Feb 27, 2026, 1/5: "They recently locked the ability to stream to Chromecast behind a paywall."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      2 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Apr 8, 2026 - May 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ibeneme Chidumebi_, May 12, 2026, 1/5: "for The past 2 months I can't login in the app"
            2. _Razaz Omer_, Apr 8, 2026, 4/5: "I love it it's really good it has everything you need to get toned but I can even open the app it just closes the app and I tried to delete and install, joined in a different account, and I restarted my phone! please fix this problem"
